steps.title: Mark the series of actions
steps.content: The sentence lists three things mosses can do: clone themselves, enter a dormant state, and grow in places without soil. The first item needs punctuation that separates it from the second item while keeping all three actions in one series.

steps.title: Reject sentence-breaking marks
steps.content: Choice A uses a semicolon in a simple series, Choice C creates a fragment beginning with And enter, and Choice D omits the needed separator. A comma after themselves correctly divides the series. The answer is B.
